summary: A Fox News LIVE segment in which Deputy ICE Director Madison Sheahan, in a remote interview box, talks about ICE targeting 'the worst of the worst' in Chicago and criticizes Gov. Pritzker, with Fox chyrons about Pritzker and 'authoritarian regime.' It is a straight cable-news interview clip, not a produced or music-driven piece, so it falls outside youth-appeal produced content.
notable_text: FOX NEWS ALERT; PRITZKER IMPLIES STATE ATTYS INVESTIGATING I.C.E.; PRITZKER: TRUMP MOVING TO 'AUTHORITARIAN REGIME'; Madison Sheahan, Deputy I.C.E. Director
